data.title: Jacobs joint venture to design five new stations for Sydney Metro West project
data.description: Dallas-based company Jacobs, along with GHD and WSP, have been selected to collaborate on the design of five new underground stations for Sydney Metro West – Stations Package West in Australia. The joint venture will focus on designing these stations to support the expansion of the metro system in Sydney.

data.title: Teledyne Technologies Reports First Quarter Results
data.description: Teledyne Technologies Incorporated (NYSE:TDY) in Thousand Oaks, Calif. reported record-breaking first quarter results. Their net sales for the quarter totaled $1,560.1 million, marking a 7.6% increase from the previous year. The company's GAAP diluted earnings per share for the quarter were $4.85, while their non-GAAP diluted earnings per share reached $5.80, showing a significant 17.2% increase from last year. Teledyne also reported $234.0 million in cash from operations and $204 million in free cash flow for the first quarter, reflecting strong financial performance.

data.title: PENGU sees big gains with Bitcoin at $78K, $418M liquidated. Altcoins rally; market outlook improves, experts cautious.
data.description: The cryptocurrency market has seen a positive shift as alternative coins surged while Bitcoin approached a retest of $78,000. Despite this, experts are still exercising caution.

data.title: Surf Air Mobility Co-Founders, Officers, and Directors Backing 2026 Plan with Common Stock Purchases
data.description: In Los Angeles, Surf Air Mobility Inc. disclosed that key officers and directors, such as a Co-Founder, Chairman of the Board, CEO, and CFO, have collectively purchased $5.3 million worth of SRFM common stock. The transactions were reported in Form 4 filings with the Securities and Exchange Commission. This move comes as part of the company's air mobility platform's ongoing activities.

data.title: OneSpaWorld Announces First Quarter Fiscal 2026 Financial Results on April 29, 2026
data.description: OneSpaWorld Holdings Limited, a leading global provider of health and wellness offerings on cruise ships and at destination resorts, is set to unveil its First Quarter Fiscal 2026 financial results on Wednesday, April 29th before the market opens. The company, listed on NASDAQ as OSW, will host a conference call at 10:00 am Eastern Time on the same day to delve into the quarterly performance. This release will provide investors and stakeholders with key insights into the company's financial standing and operational activities.

data.title: Chatham Financial to Acquire Hodes Weill & Associates To Provide Comprehensive Capital Markets Solutions to Real Assets Managers
data.description: Chatham Financial, a major independent capital markets advisor, has revealed its plans to acquire Hodes Weill & Associates, a prominent global capital advisory firm specializing in real estate, infrastructure, and other real assets. The acquisition marks a significant step for Chatham, known for providing expert advice and innovative technology solutions to help organizations manage risk and capitalize on opportunities. This strategic move aims to combine the strengths of both firms, creating a comprehensive offering in the global market.

data.title: Netradyne Achieves ISO 42001 AI Management System Certification with Zero Non-Conformities
data.description: Netradyne, based in San Diego, proudly confirmed the successful completion of its inaugural ISO 42001 Artificial Intelligence Management System (AIMS) certification audit. This achievement signifies the company's commitment to implementing high standards in artificial intelligence practices.

data.title: Nextdoor Opens Dallas Office, Plans to Grow DFW Team Substantially in 2026
data.description: Nextdoor, the neighborhood network platform, has inaugurated its Dallas office, marking its fifth office location in the US alongside SF, NYC, LA, and Chicago. This Texas hub signifies a targeted expansion effort with established executive leadership in the city. Commencing with a team of 15 employees, Nextdoor aims to increase its workforce to 30-40 members by the summer of 2026 in Dallas, signifying a significant step in the company's growth strategy.

data.title: Kvika banki hf.: Kvika issues inaugural SEK 300 million AT1 notes
data.description: Today, Kvika has completed the issuance of Additional Tier 1 (AT1) notes, a crucial part of the Bank's capital optimization strategy outlined with its year-end results in February. This marks Kvika's inaugural issuance of AT1 notes, signaling a significant achievement for the Bank as it continues to expand and enhance profitability. The oversubscribed issuance was well received by investors in Scandinavia, reaffirming confidence in the Bank's growth trajectory.
